title: crotalaria sessilis
intro: Crotalaria sessilis is a flowering plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria sessilis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it can also be dried and made into teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
